'''Wuxod''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] who represented [[Derilyn]] and the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the Empire. Born in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Paran]], he was an open critic of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and disappeared after stating Derilyn's opposition to Palpatine's power grab. He was survived by a [[Wuxod (male)|grandson]], who led the resistance movement known as the [[Friends of Paran]].

{{Char-stub}}
